@graph.description: Ipamorelin is a selective ghrelin-receptor agonist (growth hormone secretagogue) with more human clinical data than most peptides in this class, showing reliable dose-dependent GH release with minimal cortisol/prolactin cross-reactivity; downstream body-composition and sleep claims are more extrapolated than proven.
@graph.name: Ipamorelin
